reason: Backend checklist and KGTraceVis invariants for batch evidence generation.
Reusable adapter batch logic belongs under src/kgtracevis; scripts should orchestrate.
Batch loaders and writers should fail clearly on invalid input/output conditions.
Defines pytest, ruff, mypy, and example-run quality gates.
Batch conversion should reuse existing single-record adapters.
Batch generated evidence feeds schema validation, pipeline, experiments, and paper scripts.
